clusters.justification: This cluster reflects the macroscopic computation of valenced states and physiological arousal, typically subserved by the salience and limbic networks.
These terms delineate the neuroeconomic and motivational processes of reward appraisal and cost-benefit computation, predominantly anchored in the mesolimbic and orbitofrontal circuitry.
This dimension captures the internally-directed abstraction of self and others, encompassing interpersonal and autobiographical representations core to default mode network functioning.
